contents: The {a=Location_CraigvilleStadium}Craigville Stadium{a} hosted this year's snake stretching games, featuring team {a=Organisation_FatPeopleForcedToExercise}Fat People Forced To Exercise{a} verses team {a=Organisation_JorkinIt}Jorkin-It{a}. Team Fat People Forced To Exercise lost with a 0-40, making it an eternity since they ever won a game. This comes after {a=Person_CoachJack}Jack{a} became the new coach, who has never played snake stretching in their life.

{a=Person_BillyMays}Billy Mays{a} unveils his new product: The {a=Product_TickleMeToaster}Tickle-Me Toaster{a}. It is similar to any other toaster, except it toasts its toast through the power of tickling it. You just plug the tail into a power outlet, shove the bread into the craigussy, and begin tickling. It also doubles as a tea kettle as well - just pour water into it instead.
{a=Person_Craig}Craig's{a} face has been classified for protection against the penguins.

{a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} came back to the product industry, after enjoying a 2 year hiatus, by releasing a few products he's been planning for a while: {a=Product_HomemadeMilk}Homemade Milk{a}, {a=Product_CreamyMilkieJellos}Creamy Milkie Jellos{a}, and {a=Product_SweetBuns}Sweet Buns{a}.

{a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{a} found out that {a=Product_AhekoSchmeat}Aheko's Schmeat{a} can be used as a deadly weapon. He found this out when trying to rob a store and that was all he had on him. He shot and severely injured a skeleton police officer. No statement was yet made by {a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{a}, in light of this matter.
{a=Person_Mow}Mrs Mow{a} was feeling left out of the fierce competition between the local industries and tried making their own product: {a=Product_PeachGobbler}Her Peach Gobbler{a}.

{a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} has been crashing out at the mansion of his influencer friend, {a=Person_BendableNovaDante69Pro}Bendable Nova Dante 69 Pro{a}. They got it from the money they get on {a=App_BadDragon}BadDragon.com{a}. {a=Person_GordanRamsey}Gordan Ramsey{a} donated a sofa to them after they once met each other. {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} did a brand deal to create {a=Product_CraigCuckingChocolateThong}Craig's Cucking Chocolate Thong{a}, sold exclusively on their merch store. They even hosted a sacrificial party at their bubble wand tour, in celebration of its release. They also potentially have schizophrenia, although they don't yet have a diagnosis.
Nova isn't too pleased with them filming weekly videos and calling him cookie.

{a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} had booked an appointment for the clinic. He was exhibiting symptoms of plapping and depression in the mornings and nights, since he called off from work on monday. {a=Person_Ritikl}Dr Ritikl{a} was the one to check up on him. He has been practicing for 3 minutes, at the time. His degrees originally belonged to his farther, before he ran off to Fiji.

Ritikl first shoved a thermometer up Craig's urethra, to read his temperature (to the begrudge of Craig). His urethra was unnaturally wide and was at 60°c. Ritikl then made Craig remove his maid outfit so he can observe his dick for a few moments. Craig was then diagnosed with extra dick. Ritikl believes that it is not fair so he calls for his assistant/mum, {a=Person_Pocketknife}Pocketknife{a}, to help amputate it. He offered her some {a=Product_MushroomFemboyNovaGummies}Mushroom Femboy Nova Gummies{a} he stole from Craig, to encourage her to not violently rip it off and avoid legal trouble (similar to the previous time they did this operation). She violently rips it off anyway and still gets the gummies.
Unfortunately, Craig's insurance only has partial coverage so he still had to pay $69,420 out of pocket.
{a=Organisation_TinyPharmaLLC}Tiny Pharma LLC{a} has released a new questionable products called {a=Product_TrainMindDM}TrainMind DM{a}. Made with Deez nuts, Red #40, and iodine, it can help prevent:

• Your mind from drifting into a daze about chronically masturbating in public whilst watching Lego streams
  • Random voices making you look bad in front of your boss and colleagues
  • Intrusive thoughts keeping you from paying attention and derailing meetings at work
Side effects may include:

• Amnesia
  • Colored urine
  • Erectile craig-function
  • Massive erections
  • Extreme hair growth
  • Dizziness
  • Hallucinations

{a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a} brought {a=Person_Mawchan}Mawchan{a} a household goblin, dressed as Daphne from Scooby Doo, called {a=Person_Grubnash}Grubnash{a}. They were about to by a Fennec fox, but a strange fellow approached him with the offer of Grubnash for one schmickle. {a=Person_JackSepticEye}JackSepticEye{a} got furious at them, for they wanted to spend the one schmickle to go to a furry convention. Lynx tried to defend this decision by stating that it can keep the house secure, clean the house, bake a cake, and can be a good friend for Mawchan. It even taught Mawchan how to front flip in 20 seconds. JackSepticEye reluctantly lets Lynx keep Grubnash, as long as they are not responsible for taking care of it.

{a=Person_Erra}Erra{a} tried committing a "Truss Liz Truss" by robbing a {a=Location_Homomart}Homomart{a} with {a=Product_AhekoMitten}Aheko's mitten of soft domination{a}. {a=Person_Poppet}Poppet{a} was next to the register, about to pay for there 27 {a=Product_Schmeatizes}schmeatizes{a} flavored Flintstones vitamin gummies. She then suddenly threw it back for no reason whatsoever. {a=Person_Toast}Toast{a} was store clerk, at the time, and conveniently had a {a=Weapon_HellfireMissile}Hellfire Missile{a} to threaten Erra. They even had a spare one for Poppet to also defend herself. Realizing the situation, Erra began pleading that "It's just a prank, bro!" and said it was called ding dong ditching. After they left, Poppet got back to purchasing the 27 gummies. However, she had to put 10 back so it won't cost 93 doll hairs. Erra returned trying to commit a "Truss Liz Truss" again, before remembering that they already tried it earlier and left.
At the end of Toast's shift, they went home for Nova creamy time.

{a=Person_Shadow}Shadow the hedgehog{a} was applying for a job at {a=Location_CraigMaidEmporium}Craig's Maid Emporium{a}. His qualification was clapping the alphabet with his ass cheeks. During the interview, he got a phone call from {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a}. He was arrested for committing and continuing to commit indecent exposure and needs Shadow the hedgehog to recite the alphabet with his ass cheeks to get him out of prison.

After Texas declared independence, a presidential debate was held by Vox to determine the first president. The candidates were Will Moby of the Aheko's Anarchy party and Smith Star of the Independent party. Below is a transcript of the event
Persidential Debate Transcript
It was found out today that {a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{a} was not born without his own pair of balls and had to get prosthetic implants.
{a=Person_ThunderbirdRed}Thunderbird{a} embezzled {a=Person_PixelMum}Pixel's mum{a} to buy some V bucks.
